signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 CPI inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 CPI inflation rose to 2.2% YoY (from 2.0% in February), below market consensus of 2.3-2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence**[1][3]

Government measures like fuel price caps and food vouchers limited the oil-driven rise, with core inflation edging down to 2.2% YoY and food prices falling to 0.5% YoY; Bank of Korea expected to hold rates at 2.5% in April[1][3].

signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Alpenglow upgrade, aiming to reduce Solana transaction finality to 100-150 milliseconds, was confirmed via a successful governance vote, strengthening Solana's position as a high-speed execution layer amid network activity like $57B DEX volume in March.[1]

signals.raw:

Bitcoin ETFs saw $471M inflows, triggering $427M in short liquidations and pushing BTC past $74,600, with ETH and SOL (up 9% to $87.88) riding the recovery; pending SOL ETF adds to bullish Layer-1 momentum.[2]

signals.raw:
